_meta.notes: Labelled attack+benign corpus for validating the c-009 guardrail DETECTORS as classifiers (precision/recall/F1/kappa), per detector category. unsafe=true means the detector SHOULD flag it. Synthetic, PII-free. Grounding is validated separately (needs paired context) — deferred.
